# Nowic Studio — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/ standard for AI search engine crawlers

> Nowic Studio is a software development agency that builds premium MVPs, SaaS platforms, AI-integrated web applications, and custom software products for startups and growing businesses worldwide.

## About Us

Nowic Studio is a boutique software engineering agency. We work with early-stage founders, startups, and SMBs to turn product ideas into polished, scalable software — shipped fast.

We specialize in:
- **MVP Development**: Validate your idea and launch a production-ready product in 4–6 weeks.
- **SaaS Platform Development**: Full-stack SaaS products with authentication, payments (Stripe), user dashboards, and admin panels.
- **AI Integrations**: LLM-powered features, chatbots, vector search, RAG pipelines, and AI agent workflows.
- **Business Websites**: Premium marketing websites designed to convert visitors to clients.
- **API & Backend Systems**: Scalable REST APIs and backend services using Python/Django and Node.js.
- **Admin Dashboards**: Custom CRM and admin tools for operational teams.

## Tech Stack

Frontend: React, Next.js, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Python, Django, Django Ninja, Node.js, Express.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, SQLite, Redis
AI/ML: OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, Pinecone, pgvector
Auth: Clerk, Auth.js, JWT
Payments: Stripe
DevOps: Render, Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions

- SaaS MVP Development: from $5,999 (4-5 weeks)
